name: §6Skeleton Horse
description:
§8Combat Mount

§7Run around town on your scary, yet
§7trusty, steed!

§7Intelligence: §b100
§7Speed: §f50

§6Ridable
§7Right-click your summoned pet to
§7ride it!

§6Run
§7Increases the speed of your mount
§7by §a150%§7.

§6Ride Into Battle
§7While riding your horse, gain +§a40%
§7bow damage.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Zombie Skeleton Horse Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aSkeleton Horse§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!

§5§lEPIC COSMETIC
